raw:
ISSUES:
- [severity:critical] _index_style.scss:228 - The `@media` directive appears to have been corrupted by a global search-and-replace error, substituting the keyword with an internal file path (`@KiiPS-UI/target/classes/static/img/icon_filetype_media.svg`), which will break the CSS syntax and prevent responsive styles from applying.

VERDICT: needs-attention
SUMMARY: The stylesheet contains a critical syntax error where a responsive media query header was accidentally replaced with a file path, likely during an automated refactoring or search-replace operation.
